text.title: rag Decision Tree
text.summary: Tree choosing among context-stuffing, standard RAG, and agentic RAG.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the corpus fit a single context window AND token cost per query is acceptable?

branch.conclusion: Use agentic RAG (iterative retrieve) on top of the same pipeline.
Standard RAG with chunk + metadata + rerank + cited answer.

example.description: Standard RAG is the default when the corpus is too large to stuff and queries are single-hop with no special exact-match needs.
